message:
🌱 Add keda: Add support for the "Value" metric type in addition to mission (#1320)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-2030-add-support-for-the-value-metric-type-in-addition-to-averagevalue",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Add support for the \"Value\" metric type in addition to \"AverageValue\"",
+    "description": "Add support for the \"Value\" metric type in addition to \"AverageValue\". Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nExcept for the CPU and memory scalers, all scalers, including the external scaler, only support the `averageValue` metric type. The proposal is to allow for other metric types (specifically `value`)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for the \"Value\" metric type in addition to…",
+        "description": "Add support for `ValueMetricType` in all scalers except cpu/memory by introducing a new optional `metricType` field to the ScaleTrigger spec. The field will default to `AverageValueMetricType` to maintain backward compatibility.\n\nNotes:\n- The `Utilization` metric type is not supported for external metrics, only `Value` or `AverageValue`.\n- The CPU/memory scalers will continue to support the `Utilization` and `AverageValue` metric types.\n- The fallback capability will continue to be supported\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for the \"Value\" metric type in addition to…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add support for `ValueMetricType` in all scalers except cpu/memory by introducing a new optional `metricType` field to the ScaleTrigger spec. The field will default to `AverageValueMetricType` to maintain backward compatibility.\n\nNotes:\n- The `Utilization` metric type is not supported for external metrics, only `Value` or `AverageValue`.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "keda",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"

+    ],

+    },
